summary: Resolved all four packet findings in chapter_06. The voicemail-recovery material now reads as Nate's frightened, source-shaky inference with explicit uncertainty; the pre-interview run-up is compressed to a single unresolved-search beat before Mallick appears; and the repeated red-marker and third-step explanations are removed. Nate's voicemail-deletion timing was also aligned to the continuity sheet's roughly 3:15 AM value.
